name: solveos-cli
description: Install the solveOS problem-solving framework as slash commands, agents, and hooks into AI coding assistants

scripts.test: tsx --test tests/state-machine.test.ts tests/artifacts.test.ts tests/templates.test.ts tests/security.test.ts tests/wave-executor.test.ts tests/hooks.test.ts tests/runtime-adapters.test.ts
scripts.test:coverage: c8 --check-coverage --lines 70 --reporter text --reporter lcov tsx --test tests/state-machine.test.ts tests/artifacts.test.ts tests/templates.test.ts tests/security.test.ts tests/wave-executor.test.ts tests/hooks.test.ts tests/runtime-adapters.test.ts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm test
